minerType.name: CapStash(Solo)
minerType.description: CapStash Solo Miner by Cellhasher made for over 36 different phone chipsets
minerType.installScript:
import os, time, subprocess, tempfile, json
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()
wallet_address = os.environ.get("wallet_address", "")
threads = os.environ.get("threads", "-1")
additional_flags = os.environ.get("additional_flags", "")
worker_names_raw = os.environ.get("worker_names_json", "")
worker_names = json.loads(worker_names_raw) if worker_names_raw else {}

# Parse additional_flags for capstash-specific config overrides
# e.g. "tag=CellSwarm,dbcache=128,max_connections=8"
def parse_flags(flags_str):
    result = {}
    if not flags_str.strip():
        return result
    for flag in flags_str.split(","):
        flag = flag.strip()
        if "=" not in flag:
            continue
        key, value = flag.split("=", 1)
        result[key.strip()] = value.strip()
    return result

extra = parse_flags(additional_flags)

install_script_content = r'''#!/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/bash
set -e

echo "[*] Configuring Termux for external app access..."
mkdir -p ~/.termux
if ! grep -q "allow-external-apps" ~/.termux/termux.properties 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "allow-external-apps = true" >> ~/.termux/termux.properties
    echo "[OK] allow-external-apps enabled"
else
    echo "[OK] allow-external-apps already configured"
fi

echo "[*] Updating packages..."
yes '' | pkg upgrade -y || true
pkg update -y || true

echo "[*] Installing dependencies..."
pkg install git -y || true

echo "[*] Cloning CapStash miner..."
if [ -d "$HOME/capstash-miner" ]; then
    echo "[*] Repository exists, pulling latest..."
    cd "$HOME/capstash-miner" && git pull || true
else
    git clone https://github.com/CellHasher/capstash-miner "$HOME/capstash-miner"
fi

echo "[*] Running installer..."
cd "$HOME/capstash-miner"
bash scripts/install.sh --wallet-address "__WALLET__" --threads __THREADS__ __EXTRA_ARGS__

echo "[*] Verifying installation..."
if [ -d "$HOME/capstash" ] && [ -f "$HOME/capstash/run.sh" ]; then
    echo "[OK] CapStash miner installed successfully!"
    ls -la "$HOME/capstash/"
else
    echo "[!] CapStash installation may have failed - check above for errors"
fi
'''

def install_on_device(device_id, script_path):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting CapStash installation...")

        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        device_temp_path = "/data/local/tmp/capstash_install.sh"
        subprocess.run(f'{ADB} -s {device_id} push "{script_path}" "{device_temp_path}"', shell=True, check=True)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell chmod 755 {device_temp_path}", shell=True, check=True)

        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(10)

        adb_typed_cmd = "bash%s/data/local/tmp/capstash_install.sh"
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"{adb_typed_cmd}\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Install process started!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Success"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

# Build extra args for install.sh
extra_args_parts = []
tag = extra.get("tag", "CellSwarm")
extra_args_parts.append(f"--tag {tag}")

# Customize the install script per-device (wallet is same for all)
script_content = install_script_content
script_content = script_content.replace("__WALLET__", wallet_address)
script_content = script_content.replace("__THREADS__", threads)
script_content = script_content.replace("__EXTRA_ARGS__", " ".join(extra_args_parts))

with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n', delete=False, suffix='.sh') as f:
    f.write(script_content)
    local_script_path = f.name

if not devices:
    print("No devices in $devices")
elif not wallet_address:
    print("ERROR: No wallet address specified! CapStash requires a wallet address for solo mining.")
else:
    print(f"Installing CapStash miner on {len(devices)} device(s)")
    print(f"  Wallet: {wallet_address[:8]}...{wallet_address[-6:]}")
    print(f"  Threads: {threads}")
    print(f"  Tag: {tag}")

    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(install_on_device, d, local_script_path): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                print(future.result())
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Exception: {exc}")

    os.unlink(local_script_path)
    print("Install commands sent. CapStash builds from source may take ~30 minutes on first install.")
minerType.runScript:
import os, time, json, subprocess, tempfile
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()
wallet_address = os.environ.get("wallet_address", "")
threads = os.environ.get("threads", "-1")
additional_flags = os.environ.get("additional_flags", "")
worker_names_raw = os.environ.get("worker_names_json", "")
worker_names = json.loads(worker_names_raw) if worker_names_raw else {}

# DEBUG: Print all env vars so we can see what's being passed
print(f"DEBUG: ADB path = '{ADB}'")
print(f"DEBUG: devices = {devices}")
print(f"DEBUG: wallet_address = '{wallet_address}'")
print(f"DEBUG: threads = '{threads}'")
print(f"DEBUG: additional_flags = '{additional_flags}'")

def parse_flags(flags_str):
    result = {}
    if not flags_str.strip():
        return result
    for flag in flags_str.split(","):
        flag = flag.strip()
        if "=" not in flag:
            continue
        key, value = flag.split("=", 1)
        result[key.strip()] = value.strip()
    return result

extra = parse_flags(additional_flags)

def run_on_device(device_id):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Starting CapStash mining...")

        worker_name = worker_names.get(device_id, "")

        config = {
            "wallet_address": wallet_address,
            "threads": int(threads) if threads != "-1" else -1,
            "worker_name": worker_name if worker_name else device_id.replace(":", "_"),
            "coinbase_tag": extra.get("tag", "CellSwarm"),
            "target": "auto",
            "rpc_port": 8332,
            "rpc_user": "miner",
            "rpc_password": f"cellhasher_{device_id.replace(':', '_')}",
            "max_connections": int(extra.get("max_connections", "16")),
            "dbcache": int(extra.get("dbcache", "256")),
            "maxmempool": int(extra.get("maxmempool", "50")),
            "listen": extra.get("listen", "true").lower() == "true",
            "txindex": False,
            "addnodes": extra.get("addnodes", "").split(";") if extra.get("addnodes") else [],
            "autostart": True,
        }

        config_json = json.dumps(config)
        print(f"[{device_id}] Config JSON: {config_json[:200]}...")

        print(f"[{device_id}] Force stopping Termux...")
        r = subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] force-stop result: stdout='{r.stdout.strip()}' stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}' rc={r.returncode}")
        time.sleep(2)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Pushing config to /sdcard/...")
        with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', encoding='utf-8', newline='\n', delete=False, suffix='.json') as f:
            f.write(config_json)
            local_config_path = f.name
        r = subprocess.run(f'{ADB} -s {device_id} push "{local_config_path}" /sdcard/.capstash_config.json', shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] push result: stdout='{r.stdout.strip()}' stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}' rc={r.returncode}")
        os.unlink(local_config_path)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Launching Termux...")
        r = subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] launch result: stdout='{r.stdout.strip()}' stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}' rc={r.returncode}")
        time.sleep(10)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Typing cp command...")
        r = subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"cp%s/sdcard/.capstash_config.json%s~/capstash/config.json\"", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] cp input result: rc={r.returncode} stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}'")
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Typing cd command...")
        r = subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"cd%s~/capstash\"", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] cd input result: rc={r.returncode} stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}'")
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        print(f"[{device_id}] Typing bash run.sh...")
        r = subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"bash%srun.sh\"", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
        print(f"[{device_id}] run input result: rc={r.returncode} stderr='{r.stderr.strip()}'")
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)

        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon true", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] All commands sent!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Mining started"
    except Exception as e:
        import traceback
        print(f"[{device_id}] EXCEPTION: {e}")
        traceback.print_exc()
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Starting CapStash Solo Mining ===")

if not devices:
    print("ERROR: No devices specified! $devices env var is empty.")
elif not wallet_address:
    print("ERROR: No wallet address! $wallet_address env var is empty.")
else:
    print(f"Wallet: {wallet_address}")
    print(f"Threads: {threads}")
    print(f"Devices: {devices}")

    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(run_on_device, d): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            device_id = future_to_device[future]
            try:
                print(future.result())
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"[{device_id}] Exception: {exc}")

    print("Done.")
minerType.stopScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def stop_on_device(device_id):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Stopping CapStash mining...")

        # Try graceful stop via the stop.sh script
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Run stop.sh
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"cd%s~/capstash%s&&%sbash%sstop.sh\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Also kill processes directly as backup
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"pkill%s-f%sCapStashd\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        # Force stop Termux as last resort
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)

        # Turn screen off
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell svc power stayon false", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] CapStash mining stopped!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Stopped"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Stopping CapStash Mining ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(stop_on_device, d): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            try:
                print(future.result())
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"Exception: {exc}")

    print("CapStash stopped on all devices.")
minerType.uninstallScript:
import os, time, subprocess
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor, as_completed

ADB = os.environ.get("adb_path", "adb")
devices = os.environ.get("devices", "").split()

def uninstall_on_device(device_id):
    try:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Uninstalling CapStash...")

        # Force stop Termux first
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am force-stop com.termux", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)

        # Launch Termux
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell am start -n com.termux/com.termux.app.TermuxActivity", shell=True)
        time.sleep(5)

        # Remove capstash directory and cloned repo
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input text \"rm%s-rf%s~/capstash%s~/capstash-miner\"", shell=True)
        time.sleep(1)
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell input keyevent 66", shell=True)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Clean up config from sdcard
        subprocess.run(f"{ADB} -s {device_id} shell rm -f /sdcard/.capstash_config.json", shell=True)

        print(f"[{device_id}] CapStash uninstalled!")
        return f"[{device_id}] Uninstalled"
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}")
        return f"[{device_id}] Error: {e}"

print("=== Uninstalling CapStash ===")

if not devices:
    print("No devices specified")
else:
    with ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=len(devices)) as executor:
        future_to_device = {executor.submit(uninstall_on_device, d): d for d in devices}
        for future in as_completed(future_to_device):
            try:
                print(future.result())
            except Exception as exc:
                print(f"Exception: {exc}")

    print("CapStash uninstalled from all devices.")
